checklist_items.title: Verify TLS/SSL configuration for DApp API
checklist_items.description: Ensure the DApp Backend API endpoints processing sensitive transaction data are configured with strong, valid TLS/SSL certificates and settings.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The communication channel between the user's wallet and the DApp backend is not sufficiently encrypted or protected against man-in-the-middle attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong TLS/SSL on all communication channels.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Automated scan report (e.g., SSL Labs), server configuration files.

checklist_items.title: Implement and verify signature validation on API
checklist_items.description: Ensure the DApp Backend API requires and correctly validates digital signatures for incoming transaction payloads before processing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The communication channel between the user's wallet and the DApp backend is not sufficiently encrypted or protected against man-in-the-middle attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require digital signatures for critical transaction payloads.
checklist_items.evidence_required: API test results (positive and negative cases), relevant code review findings.

checklist_items.title: Confirm Smart Contract verifies transaction signatures on-chain
checklist_items.description: Review Smart Contract X code and deployment to verify that state-changing functions require and validate the user's digital signature on-chain.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Transaction signing is not enforced or verifiable on-chain.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure all state-changing transactions are digitally signed by the user's private key and signatures are verified on-chain.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract source code review report, deployment verification, unit test results.

checklist_items.title: Verify comprehensive transaction logging for non-repudiation
checklist_items.description: Ensure logs capture sender identity, transaction details, timestamp, and signature verification status for all received transaction requests to provide an auditable trail supporting non-repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Insufficient logging and lack of non-repudiation mechanisms.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Log all transaction requests with associated user identity and signature.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Log samples, logging configuration documentation, successful audit trail test.
